    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>16:16</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>16:07</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>15:09</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>14:41</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>

    <title>Fable 5 requiring usage credits on Max plans</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>15:35</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>20</var>, <var data-var='time'>07:35</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - Some Claude Code Max plan users were incorrectly prompted to use usage credits to access Fable 5, which is included in their plan. If you were affected, please restart Claude Code. </p>
